description: Phonon (lattice vibration) data for quasicrystal materials
phason_explanation: Phasons are collective rearrangements of atoms without net displacement - unique to quasicrystals. They represent diffusive motion in perpendicular space.

materials.DOS_notes: Fractal-like fine structure in phonon DOS; pseudogap feature
materials.inelastic_neutron_scattering_ref: Niermann et al., Phys Rev Lett 1995

materials.notes: Anisotropic phonons: periodic along 10-fold, quasiperiodic in plane
